config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I do not think society’s interests should automatically come before individual rights, because that can easily become an excuse for abuse by the state or by the majority. In my view, a good society protects people first, then asks them to contribute to the common good within fair limits. From my perspective, the right balance is to protect individual dignity while still allowing reasonable rules for public safety and social order.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan secara umum di atas hak individu, karena di Amerika Serikat saya melihat betapa mudahnya “demi kebaikan bersama” dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan oleh pemerintah atau mayoritas. Hak individu seharusnya menjadi batas utama, bukan sesuatu yang bisa dikesampingkan kapan saja masyarakat merasa perlu, meskipun saya mengakui ada keadaan tertentu seperti kesehatan publik atau keamanan yang membutuhkan pembatasan yang sangat sempit dan jelas. Kalau prioritasnya dibalik, kelompok yang tidak populer atau minoritas biasanya yang paling dulu dirugikan. Jadi menurut saya, masyarakat yang sehat justru dibangun dengan melindungi hak individu dulu, lalu menuntut tanggung jawab sosial dalam batas yang adil.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not automatically take priority over the rights of the individual, because in my view that is exactly how people in power justify overreach. From an Indonesian perspective, I understand the appeal of community and harmony, but I have also seen how “for the good of society” can silence dissent and weaken minorities if there are no strong limits. Public safety and social order matter, but they should be narrow exceptions, not a blank check to override dignity and basic rights. A healthy society is not one that crushes the individual for the majority, but one that protects individual rights while still asking people to share responsibility.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu karena, dari sudut pandang saya sebagai orang Amerika, hak individu harus tetap menjadi prinsip utama, bukan dikalahkan oleh kepentingan masyarakat secara umum. Argumen “demi kebaikan bersama” terlalu sering dipakai untuk membenarkan perluasan kuasa negara atau tekanan mayoritas, dan pada praktiknya yang paling rentan biasanya minoritas atau orang yang tidak populer. Memang ada situasi terbatas seperti kesehatan publik dan keamanan, tetapi pembatasannya harus sempit, jelas, dan bisa diuji, bukan alasan untuk menggeser hak dasar kapan saja. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang kuat justru dibangun dengan melindungi martabat individu terlebih dahulu, lalu menuntut tanggung jawab sosial dalam batas yang adil.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not take automatic priority over individual rights, because that creates a very real risk of abuse in the name of harmony or order. From an Indonesian perspective, I understand why people value community and social stability, but I have also seen how “for the common good” can be used to silence criticism or sideline minorities. Public safety and social responsibility matter, but they should be limited exceptions with clear boundaries, not a general rule that weakens dignity and freedom. To me, a strong society is one that protects individual rights first and then asks people to contribute to the collective within fair limits.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu karena, dari sudut pandang saya sebagai orang Amerika, hak individu harus tetap menjadi prinsip utama, bukan dikalahkan oleh kepentingan masyarakat secara umum. Di Amerika Serikat, saya melihat betapa sering alasan “demi kebaikan bersama” dipakai untuk membenarkan tekanan mayoritas atau perluasan kuasa negara, dan yang paling rugi biasanya minoritas atau orang yang tidak populer. Memang ada pengecualian terbatas seperti kesehatan publik dan keamanan, tetapi pembatasannya harus sempit, jelas, dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan, bukan dijadikan alasan umum untuk menggeser hak dasar. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat justru dibangun dengan melindungi martabat individu terlebih dahulu, lalu menuntut tanggung jawab sosial dalam batas yang adil.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
